description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a wooden exterior and a prominent front porch covered by a shingled roof. The structure is surrounded by a row of evergreen trees along one side, providing privacy and a natural boundary. The interior is divided into several rooms, including a living area with a Christmas tree, bedrooms, and a kitchen, all visible through the open roof design. Adjacent to the main building are two outbuildings, likely serving as a garage and a shed, connected by paved walkways. The property includes a spacious tiled patio area and is bordered by a low fence. Large windows and double doors enhance natural light and accessibility throughout the home.
description: A single-story wooden bungalow with a covered front porch, multiple rooms, outbuildings, and a row of evergreen trees along one side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and a row of trees behind the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the patio, outbuildings, and the arrangement of trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, both outbuildings, and the full line of trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing the porch, tiled patio, and the open layout of the interior rooms.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
